name: Buffalo Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl and mix until well blended.
2. Form the mixture into patties and grill over medium heat for about 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
3. Serve on buns as desired.
Note: The teen-age crowd who tasted these burgers requested seconds, indicating they enjoyed them. Buffalo meat is lean and dries out easily, so it's best to cook it slowly without direct flame exposure.
